tasks.// backend up (bg): Sobe Postgres + schema + Nest em watch, numa task de shell (PATH completo, acha o pnpm do nvm). É o preLaunchTask do 'editor ▶ local (dev)': roda em background e o editor só lança quando o Nest sobe (endsPattern). Um F5 levanta tudo.
tasks.label: backend up (bg)
tasks.command: docker compose up -d && until docker exec driva-postgres pg_isready -U driva >/dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 1; done && pnpm prisma:generate && pnpm prisma db push --skip-generate && pnpm start:dev

tasks.label: prepara backend (db + schema)
tasks.command: docker compose up -d && until docker exec driva-postgres pg_isready -U driva >/dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 1; done && pnpm prisma:generate && pnpm prisma db push --skip-generate
